decoration: moderate — a few SVG blobs or grid lines
hero_headline_scale: mixed — huge first name, smaller subtitle underneath
nav_style: side dots — floating dot indicators on the side
card_style: terminal window styled cards (title bar with dots)
contact_style: big bold email as hero text
border_radius: pill — fully rounded on small elements
color_scheme: mixed — alternating dark and light sections
quirk: hero text must be extremely large, almost full viewport width
